details.note: Created github-ipc.ts with registerGithubIpcHandlers — extracted GitHub OAuth PKCE flow (crypto, safeStorage, net, shell) from HEAD version of ipc.ts

Created ipc-validation.ts with 4 validation functions: isValidPluginConfigEntry, validateAndFilterPluginConfigs, validateAndFilterAgents, validateAndFilterMcpServers — extracted from HEAD version of ipc.ts
Added test suites for validateAndFilterAgents and validateAndFilterMcpServers alongside existing isValidPluginConfigEntry and validateAndFilterPluginConfigs tests
